description: StoryFlow enforcement hooks — pre-commit gate, auto-sync on commit, real context loading. Actions execute directly; the agent cannot bypass them.

hooks.prompt:
Before approving stop, verify ALL of the following. If StoryFlow was never loaded or is offline, approve immediately. Otherwise block until every item is done:
1. Session saved with full context: `storyflow sessions save --summary '...' --next-steps '...' --key-decisions '...' --work-done '...' --learnings '...'` must have been called. Include --issues-created and --issues-updated counts if applicable. If not saved yet, block and do it now.
2. Board reconciled: check if any In Progress issues were actually completed this session. Use `storyflow issues batch-done <key1> <key2> ...` for multiple. If unsure, use `storyflow search '<topic>' --json` to find relevant issues.
3. Wiki updated: if significant new knowledge was learned (architecture decisions, conventions, debugging findings), update the relevant Agent:* wiki page.
4. AI status idle: the command hook handles this automatically.
